rows.notes: Description merged from both extractors and visually verified. 'Conybeare' from gpt-5-mini, 'a 2do' from gemini-flash, both are clearly legible on the image.

rows.description: Die Novembris 1730 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1731.
rows.notes: Adopted description from gemini-flash, which correctly identified 'Diem revolutum' and proper capitalization, visually confirmed as clear in the image. gpt-5-mini had 'diem revolutionum'.
Consensus across both extractors for all fields, visually confirmed as clear.
Consensus across both extractors for all fields, visually confirmed as clear.

Adopted fraction (0.5) from gemini-flash, which correctly interpreted '9ob' as 9 and a half pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly dismissed it as a decorative flourish. All other fields were in consensus and visually confirmed.
Consensus across both extractors for all fields, visually confirmed as clear.
Adopted description from gemini-flash for correct punctuation (Rect: vs Rect.), amounts were in consensus and visually confirmed as clear.
Adopted description from gemini-flash, visually confirming 'Cudlington' over gpt-5-mini's 'Cuddington', and correct punctuation. Amounts were in consensus and visually confirmed as clear.
Consensus across both extractors for all fields, visually confirmed. Despite notes mentioning ink bleed, description and amounts are clear.
Adopted amounts from gemini-flash. While there is a diagonal shadow, the numbers '2 0 0' are clearly discernible upon close inspection. gpt-5-mini incorrectly deemed them unreadable and left blank.

Adopted description 'The Quit Rents' from gpt-5-mini, visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'The Suit Rents'. Adopted amounts '14 3 3' from gemini-flash, as they are clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow, contrary to gpt-5-mini's assessment.

Adopted description 'Ralph Marshalls Capons' and amounts '0 7 6' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts and had 'Marshals'.
Adopted amounts '10 9 11' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts. Description was in consensus and clear.

Adopted description 'Calcott alias Lane' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed 'Calcott' over gpt-5-mini's 'Caleb'. Adopted amounts '2 19 5' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts.

Adopted description 'Bannister' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed over gpt-5-mini's 'Barnister'. Adopted amounts '0 15 0' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts.

Adopted description 'Leaden-Hall' and amounts '1 0 0' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts. The description is clear, not 'Saden-Hall' as noted as a possibility by gemini-flash.
Adopted amounts '4 12 11' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts. Description was in consensus and clear.
Adopted amounts '1 13 4' from gemini-flash, visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts. Description was in consensus and clear.
Adopted amounts and fraction from gemini-flash, visually confirmed '8ob' as 8 and a half pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts. Description was in consensus and clear.

Adopted description 'Chilton Ffery' and amounts '4 10 4' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini had an incorrect description ('Clifton Penny') and omitted amounts.
Adopted amounts and fraction from gemini-flash, visually confirmed '11ob' as 11 and a half pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly omitted amounts. Description was in consensus and clear.

Adopted description 'Trethewern' and amounts '6 0 0' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini had an incorrect description ('Tretchew') and omitted amounts.

Adopted description 'ad Lane, Sparkes et Meriton' and amounts '26 10 0' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini had a significantly incorrect description ('Sadtane, Spukes et Meriton') and omitted amounts.

Adopted description 'Medingham' and amounts '6 13 4' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini had an incorrect description ('Medenham') and omitted amounts.

Adopted description 'Burle Gate, Boyse' and amounts '4 0 0' from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed as clearly legible despite the diagonal shadow. gpt-5-mini had an incorrect description ('Back Gate, Boyse') and omitted amounts.
